summary: Iteration 17 Testing Complete - AgentPipeline Component. All features verified: 12 agent nodes displayed horizontally, correct visual states (completed=green check, failed=red X, not_started=gray), progress bar with percentage, connector line colors based on previous agent state, 'Avvia Pipeline'/'Riesegui Pipeline' button logic, 'Approva Pratica' button for waiting_approval status, popover with output data on completed agent click, WorkflowStepper renders below pipeline.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentPipeline.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
All UI text is correctly in Italian (Raccolta, Contabilita, Conformita, etc.)
Component handles all edge cases: draft (no logs), escalated (with logs), waiting_approval
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested the new AgentPipeline component on PracticeDetailPage. All features verified working: (1) Pipeline renders 12 agents horizontally: Raccolta, Contabilita, Conformita, Documenti, Delega, Scadenze, Flusso, Instradamento, Ricerca, Monitoraggio, Spiegazione, Guardia. (2) Visual states: completed agents show green checkmark badge, failed agents show red X badge, not_started agents are gray, in_progress agents pulse with blue spinner. (3) Progress bar shows percentage (e.g., 92% for 11/12 completed). (4) Connector lines: green after completed agents, red/orange after failed agents, gray for not_started. (5) Button logic: 'Avvia Pipeline' for draft practices with no runs, 'Riesegui Pipeline' for practices that have been run, 'Approva Pratica' appears when status is waiting_approval. (6) Popover: clicking on completed/failed agent node opens popover showing branded name, status label, and output_data. (7) WorkflowStepper renders below pipeline showing practice lifecycle steps. Test practices used: b50d4f78-5295-4119-a361-8aec381fee43 (escalated, 12 logs, 11 completed, 1 failed/monitor), d8f241d9-9fa8-45a4-ae5f-5484db8ae9e3 (draft, no logs), 347e6d7b-fa95-4de8-b26d-a8963d983b3f (waiting_approval).

details: All agent types present: intake, ledger, compliance, documents, delegate, deadline, flow, routing, research, monitor, advisor, guard
Not started agents: gray styling (bg-[#F8F9FA], ring-[#E2E8F0])
In progress agents: blue spinner with pulse animation
Shows percentage (92% for escalated practice with 11/12 completed)
Progress bar color: green for success, amber when failures present
Shows 'Approva Pratica' when status is waiting_approval
Clicking completed agent node opens popover
Popover shows output_data content (truncated at 800 chars)
Shows practice lifecycle steps with current step highlighted
Agent names: Raccolta, Contabilita, Conformita, Documenti, Delega, Scadenze, Flusso, Instradamento, Ricerca, Monitoraggio, Spiegazione, Guardia
Buttons: Avvia Pipeline, Riesegui Pipeline, Approva Pratica
Status labels: Completato, Errore, Non avviato, In esecuzione
